tools_additions.notes: Read-only Airtable controlled-vocabulary profiling tool. Uses DCOIR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID and DCOIR_AIRTABLE_TOKEN plus DCOIR_REPO_ROOT/DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR, reads Airtable schema/records, inventories select options and candidate low-cardinality text fields, detects placeholder/field-name-like options, and writes profile JSON/report artifacts. Excludes Delete Queue by default to preserve deletion semantics unless IncludeDeleteQueue is explicitly set. Use before schema/select-option cleanup or vocabulary normalization planning.

sweep_basis.reason: Latest local operator_tools snapshot contained New-DcoirAirtableControlledVocabularyProfile.ps1, but Airtable Operator Tools Registry and GitHub tool catalog surfaces did not yet expose it as a discoverable tool. This addendum preserves the gap closure without rewriting unrelated catalog content.
